about.title: About Vianaar
paragraphs: For over 15 years, Vianaar has shaped some of Goa’s most sought-after second homes.
With a legacy of 100+ projects and over 1,200 homes, each space reflects a deeper way of living — thoughtful, nature-led, and enduring.
More than building homes, Vianaar creates environments that evolve with you — designed for a life that is lived.

loliem.title: Where Goa Feels Different
paragraphs: Loliem is the kind of place you arrive at and immediately exhale.
Days unfold without much planning — a short walk to the cliffs, evenings by the sea, or quiet moments shared with neighbours who feel just as at ease.

items.meta: 4 Lane highway connectivity near the site
Largest Production of Paddy Field, brown rice is supplied to entire Goa

highlights.title: Highlights
items: Vianaar’s first project in South Goa
Master plan shaped by the site’s natural contours
Indo-Portuguese architecture — verandahs, courtyards, shaded thresholds
Low-rise homes that keep open skies and green views
Native, low-maintenance landscape with tree-lined paths
Conscious design — heat-reducing walls, water-saving aerators, central energy cut-off
Curated interiors in soft palettes and natural textures
On-site Estate Manager and 300+ member facilities team

clubhouse.title: Clubhouse — Loom House
clubhouse.description: Loom House is not a clubhouse. It is a shared space where life is lived slowly — a short walk from every villa, organised around four ways to spend the day.

pillars.heading: Move & Play
pillars.description: Swimming pool, gym, padel, pétanque, pickleball, kids pool

pillars.heading: Pause & Breathe
pillars.description: Spa & salon, steam room, sauna, ice bath, yoga, meditation

pillars.heading: Gather & Connect
pillars.description: All-day café, lounge, pool table, table tennis, games room, karaoke, movies

pillars.heading: Peruse & Wonder
pillars.description: Art, talks, live music, edible gardens

items.quote: Vianaar homes are defined by their incredible relationship with nature. The integration of Portuguese style verandahs with lush Goa foliage offers an unbeatable sense of escape.
items.author: Anjali & Vikram Sen

items.quote: The focus on micro-climate control, water conservation and natural heat-reducing materials is what sets Vianaar apart. Truly sustainable luxury.
items.author: Priya Nair

items.headline: Vianaar brings Portuguese heritage and ecological mindfulness to South Goa with La Isla.
Redefining second homes in Goa: How Vianaar became the leader in ultra-luxury retreats over 15 years.
